name: utility-energy-downloader
description: Local-only Chrome extension for downloading meter usage time-series data from a supported electric utility account.

scripts.build:local: npm run check && npm run screenshots:store
scripts.check: node --check src/bridge.js && node --check src/content.js && node --check src/page-hook.js && node --check src/popup.js && node --check src/service-worker.js && node --check src/time.js && node test/time.test.js && node test/page-hook.test.js && node test/bridge.test.js
scripts.list-source: find manifest.json src test icons scripts docs README.md PRIVACY.md EULA.md LICENSE.md package.json package-lock.json .github .gitignore -type f | sort
